NAME: ICD-11
KEYWORDS: ICD-11; clinical coding; MMS; mortality; morbidity
DESCRIPTION: WHO's successor to ICD-10 for mortality and morbidity statistics (ICD-11 for MMS), with a digital-first structure, updated clinical detail, and tooling for implementation in health systems and research.
MANUAL_CITATION: World Health Organization. International Classification of Diseases, 11th Revision (ICD-11).
CITATION: World Health Organization. International Classification of Diseases for Mortality and Morbidity Statistics, 11th Revision (ICD-11). Geneva: WHO.
